title: The Music Of George Harrison Live The All Things Must Pass Orchestras Farewell Tour
company: singer and multiinstrumentalist Alex Eberhard – has lovingly recreated Harrison’s kaleidoscopic sound world, from the ground-breaking All Things Must Pass album to treasured classics like Something, While My Guitar Gently Weeps, Here Comes The Sun, and My Sweet Lord.
description: Alex Eberhard - vocals & guitarLucy Pickering- vocalsImogen Ryall - vocalsBernd Rest - guitarTony Williams - guitarDave Barnard - bass guitarSimon Robinson - keyboardsTom Arnold - drumsPaul Nieman - trombonePhilippe Guyard - saxophone Company:The All Things Must Pass Orchestra(Website)
